name: rakta-js-monorepo
description: Rakta.js monorepo - framework source, create app CLI, examples, and documentation.
author: Rhein Sullivan | Vyagra Nexus

scripts.build: bun run build:rakta && bun run build:create-rakta
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:rakta && bun run typecheck:create-rakta
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules bun.lockb bun.lock package-lock.json packages/rakta/dist packages/create-rakta/dist
scripts.build:rakta: bun build packages/rakta/src/index.ts --outdir packages/rakta/dist --target bun --sourcemap=external && bun build packages/rakta/src/cli/rakta.ts --outfile packages/rakta/dist/cli/rakta.js --target bun --sourcemap=external
